name: DHCP Spoofing - Rogue DHCP Server Detection
description: Detects DHCP spoofing and rogue DHCP server activity by monitoring for unauthorized DHCP server tools and MitM DHCP spoofing modules in bettercap/ettercap.
query: process where event.type == "start" and (process.args : ("dhcp.spoof", "dhcp6.spoof", "fake_dhcp") or (process.name : ("bettercap", "ettercap") and process.args : "*dhcp*"))
